# arch-crew

> A Claude Code plugin of three architectural-decision skills. Each helps you choose an architecture
> for new work (a short selection interview) or audit existing code (a review against a pattern
> catalog), and records the decision as an ADR or review report. The bias throughout: recommend the
> least architecture that meets the requirement, and name the cost of every pick.

## Skills

- [decide-architecture](skills/decide-architecture/SKILL.md): software architecture — structure, topology, data, overlays. Greenfield → composed stack + ADR; existing code → review + targeted moves.
- [design-patterns](skills/design-patterns/SKILL.md): GoF + Python-idiomatic design patterns. Greenfield → one recommended pattern + its Pythonic form; existing code → smell-to-pattern review.
- [agentic-patterns](skills/agentic-patterns/SKILL.md): LLM-agent systems — autonomy level, reasoning loop, memory, governance, multi-agent topology. Greenfield → layered design + ADR; existing code → seven-defect review.

## Reference knowledge (per skill)

- [architecture decision tree](skills/decide-architecture/references/decision-tree.md) and [catalog](skills/decide-architecture/references/catalog.md)
- [design-patterns decision tree](skills/design-patterns/references/decision-tree.md) and [catalog](skills/design-patterns/references/catalog.md)
- [agentic decision tree](skills/agentic-patterns/references/decision-tree.md) and [catalog](skills/agentic-patterns/references/catalog.md)

## Docs

- [Documentation — how to use](docs/README.md)
- [Worked examples](docs/examples/README.md)
- [For coding agents](AGENTS.md)

## Install

- `/plugin marketplace add AdamKrysztopa/architectural-decisions`
- `/plugin install arch-crew`
